9bd115b860af.name: Cap Junky
9bd115b860af.description:
Cap Junky is a high-potency cross of Kush Mintz x Alien Cookies, delivering a powerful yet balanced hybrid experience. Fast-acting and intense, this strain opens with an uplifting cerebral rush before settling into a smooth, full-body relaxation that stays active rather than overly sedating.

The flavor blends sweet fruit with cool menthol and floral notes, while the aroma carries fresh mint, pine, and gassy diesel undertones.

Dense forest-green buds feature bright orange hairs and a thick coating of milky amber trichomes, showcasing its premium potency.

c7bc9b6b18c2.name: Fight Club
c7bc9b6b18c2.description:
Fight Club is a balanced hybrid known for its bold character and refined terpene profile. This strain delivers an uplifting cerebral edge paired with smooth, grounded relaxation, making it versatile for both daytime and evening use.

Its aroma leads with bright citrus notes of orange and lemon, layered with subtle herbal and earthy undertones. The flavor follows with tangy grapefruit, light sweetness, and a touch of spice on the finish.

Dense forest-green buds feature purple accents, orange pistils, and a thick coating of frosty trichomes.

2223f6ee76a3.name: LIT OG
2223f6ee76a3.description:
Lit OG is a potent cross of Tahoe OG x Runtz, delivering immediate uplift with smooth indica-backed relaxation. This strain opens with a wave of clear-headed euphoria before settling into a calm, body-soothing finish that keeps you comfortably grounded.

Its terpene profile blends sweet, creamy citrus with classic kush, woody pine, and subtle spice. The aroma leans rich and earthy with bright fruit undertones.

Oversized olive-green buds feature purple accents, thick orange hairs, and a frosty coating of crystal trichomes.

f9a02875b44a.name: MAC Stomper
f9a02875b44a.description:
MAC Stomper is a flavorful cross of MAC x Grape Stomper, delivering rich fruit notes with calming indica effects. This strain settles in gradually, lifting the mood before easing into deep physical relaxation that leans tranquil and sleep-friendly.

Its terpene profile features fresh mixed berries, spicy grape, and hints of sour lemon, rounded out by floral and earthy undertones. The aroma carries a grape-forward richness with subtle spice.

Rounded olive-green buds display purple accents, orange hairs, and a frosty coating of purple-tinted trichomes.

d024338fee18.name: Soap
d024338fee18.description:
The Soap is a vibrant cross of Animal Mints x Kush Mints, delivering bold flavor with an energetic, mood-lifting experience. This sativa-leaning hybrid hits quickly, offering an uplifting headspace paired with light, stimulating body effects.

Its terpene profile blends sour citrus and sweet woody pine with hints of spicy cheese and pungent diesel. The aroma carries a sharp, minty-fuel character with a bright citrus edge.

Oversized mint-green buds feature orange hairs and a thick coating of golden-white trichomes.

1ff4b7efe819.name: Purple Octane
1ff4b7efe819.description:
Purple Octane is a potent phenotype of Hi-Octane, delivering rich flavor with deep indica-driven effects. This strain builds gradually, beginning with a lifted, euphoric headspace before settling into a heavy, full-body relaxation.

Its terpene profile blends sweet grape wine with spicy diesel and peppery undertones, creating a bold, savory-sweet aroma. As the experience deepens, it leans calming and sleepy, making it ideal for evening use.

Dense forest-green buds showcase purple hues, orange hairs, and a thick coating of frosty trichomes.

265b210f94fe.name: Runtz
265b210f94fe.description:
Runtz is a balanced cross of Zkittlez x Gelato, celebrated for its candy-like flavor and smooth, full-bodied effects. This hybrid settles in shortly after inhale, offering a calming cerebral lift before easing into deep, soothing body relaxation.

Its terpene profile bursts with tropical citrus, sour berries, and sweet pineapple, finished with a lightly pungent edge. The experience leans euphoric and tranquil, making it ideal for unwinding in the evening.

Dense olive-green buds feature purple undertones, orange hairs, and a frosty coating of crystal trichomes.

99326fcf9900.name: Donny Burger
99326fcf9900.description:
Donny Burger is a potent cross of GMO x Han Solo Burger, delivering bold flavor and full-bodied effects. This indica offers an immediate uplifted mood paired with smooth physical relaxation, creating a balanced yet deeply calming experience.

Its terpene profile is rich and savory, blending spicy pepper, cheesy funk, earthy anise, and tangy citrus undertones. The aroma leans pungent and gassy with hints of black licorice and sour citrus.

Oversized neon-green buds feature bright orange hairs and a thick coating of frosty golden-white trichomes.

6a06396da757.name: Super Boof
6a06396da757.description: Black Cherry Punch x Tropicana Cookies.

184eb9c71846.name: Grape Canyon Zkittlez
184eb9c71846.description:
Grape Canyon Zkittlez is a flavorful cross of Grape Ape x Zkittlez, delivering a balanced, full-bodied experience. This hybrid offers an uplifting cerebral boost paired with smooth physical relaxation, creating an easygoing yet satisfying effect profile.

Its terpene profile bursts with sweet grape and mixed berry notes, accented by sour citrus, subtle banana, and a touch of peppery spice. The aroma mirrors its candy-like sweetness with a lightly spicy finish.

Fluffy, dusty green buds feature purple undertones, orange hairs, and a thick coating of white trichomes.

b0990993b588.name: Girl Scout Cookies
b0990993b588.description: OG Kush X Durban Poison X F1

a64e2855f46b.name: White Widow
a64e2855f46b.description: Brazil Sativa X South Indian Indica

3f9c768ad3ef.name: GG4
3f9c768ad3ef.description:
GG4, also known as Original Glue, is a potent cross of Chem's Sister x Sour Dubb x Chocolate Diesel. This indica-leaning hybrid is known for its heavy, full-body relaxation paired with a euphoric cerebral lift that builds gradually.

Its terpene profile features bold chemical diesel notes layered with earthy mocha and subtle spice. As the effects deepen, they lean calming and sedative, making GG4 well-suited for evening use.

Fluffy olive-green buds showcase amber hairs and a thick coating of bright white trichomes.

9934b135c2db.name: Raspberry
9934b135c2db.description: 10mg THC per serving (1 piece)  - 100mg total per package.

45e8067b787c.name: Black Cherry Fizz
45e8067b787c.description: Black Dahlia X Ace of Spades

961994b89518.name: Peach
961994b89518.description: 10mg THC per serving (1 piece)  - 100mg total per package.

aadbe36acb08.name: La Cegua
aadbe36acb08.description: Black Cherry Punch x Hash Church

57a8dde82c12.name: Early Lemon Berry
57a8dde82c12.description: Las Vegas Lemon Skunk x Member Berry

baa51ab3ca78.name: Purple Milk
baa51ab3ca78.description:
Purple Milk is a flavorful cross of Purple OG Kush x Bubba Kush, delivering balanced potency with smooth, full-bodied effects. This sativa-leaning hybrid builds gradually, offering an uplifting, euphoric headspace paired with steady, calming body relaxation.

Its terpene profile blends sweet creamy vanilla kush with notes of grape and bright lemon citrus. The aroma adds floral spice layered over rich, fruity depth.

Dense emerald-green buds feature deep purple leaves, orange hairs, and a thick coating of bright white trichomes.

0332f6000648.name: Bangkok Purple
0332f6000648.description:
Bangkok Purple is a vibrant sativa-leaning cross of Purple Thai and an unknown hybrid. Known for its striking purple hues and bold terpene profile, this strain delivers bright, stimulating energy with smooth balance.

Expect uplifting mental clarity and focused motivation, making it a great option for daytime productivity or creative projects. A light layer of calm keeps the experience centered without dulling its energetic edge.

Flavor notes include tropical citrus, fresh blueberries, and subtle spicy florals. Dense olive-green buds showcase deep purple undertones and a thick coating of frosty trichomes.

dd494fcaec3c.name: Sour Blueberry
dd494fcaec3c.description: 10mg THC per serving (1 piece)  - 100mg total per package.

51e2e4ac77bd.name: Mango Fuego
51e2e4ac77bd.description:
10mg THC per serving (1 piece)  - 200mg total per package. (20 pieces)

Fiesta-ready cannabis gummies crafted to spark spice, sweetness, and just the right amount of bliss!

1072e363f968.name: Permanent Marker
1072e363f968.description:
Permanent Marker is a potent cross of Biscotti x Jealousy x Sherbet BX, delivering bold flavor with high-impact effects. This indica-leaning hybrid settles in after a few pulls, offering a lifted, creative headspace paired with steady, calming body relaxation.

Its terpene profile blends sweet and sour fruity candy with sharp citrus diesel and pungent spice. The aroma leans gassy and dank with a bright citrus edge.

Dense emerald-green buds feature purple accents, orange hairs, and a frosty layer of amber-tinted trichomes.

83b9bf160cc6.name: Green Crack
83b9bf160cc6.description: Skunk #1 and an Unknown indica (often speculated to be an Afghani landrace)

62d25dc9d10f.name: Zesty Parm
62d25dc9d10f.description: Cherry Kush x (Lemon Tree Papaya x GMO) x Fro'Do

68387bbac1ce.name: Jacked up Boof - Keif Coated
68387bbac1ce.description:
Jacked up flowed coated in Super Boof kief.

Super Boof: Purple Panty Dropper x Blueberry.

Jacked Up: Jack Herer x Timewreck.

83fa406599ab.name: Bubblegum - Keif Coated
83fa406599ab.description: Indiana Bubblegum X Unkown Indica Strain

497cc3e8e881.name: Zesty Parm 7g - Sativa
497cc3e8e881.description:
Cherry Kush X (Lemon Tree Papaya X GMO) X FroDo strains

This particular batch is Sativa-leaning. Zesty Parm is a hybrid strain, typically categorized as a slightly indica-dominant blend (usually around 60% indica and 40% sativa). However, depending on the specific cultivator and grow batch, it can lean heavily into sativa effects or present as a balanced hybrid.

130803345c65.name: Medusa 2pk (0.5gr ea)
130803345c65.description: Medusa, more commonly referred to as “The Nirvana Strain,” is a hybrid of the cult favorite Misty strain with an unknown sativa to indica ratio. However, it is thought to be evenly balanced due to its powerful combination of sativa and indica effects that complement each other perfectly.

430d15195b26.name: Grapes N Cream
430d15195b26.description:
Grapes N Cream is a balanced cross of Grape Pie x Cookies and Cream, delivering bold flavor with high-potency impact. This hybrid begins with a creative, focused headspace that enhances conversation and sociability before easing into smooth, full-body relaxation.

Its terpene profile highlights sweet vanilla cream layered with juicy grape and cherry notes, accented by subtle spice. As the effects deepen, they lean calming and indulgent.

Oversized neon-green buds feature amber undertones, thick orange hairs, and a frosty coating of golden trichomes.

99d83976ed16.name: Orange Runtz
99d83976ed16.description:
Orange Runtz is a vibrant cross of African Orange x Runtz, delivering bright citrus flavor with energetic, social effects. This sativa-leaning hybrid hits quickly, offering focused motivation and an uplifting, euphoric headspace paired with light body ease.

Its terpene profile features sweet orange candy layered with hints of banana and fresh fruit. The aroma mirrors its sugary citrus character with a subtle sour twist.

Dense dark olive-green buds showcase purple undertones, bright orange hairs, and a frosty coating of white trichomes.

2f31fd50f830.name: PR Zesty Parm
2f31fd50f830.description: Cherry Kush x (Lemon Tree Papaya x GMO) x Fro'Do

5c33b524689a.name: PR Purple Milk
5c33b524689a.description:
Purple Milk is a flavorful cross of Purple OG Kush x Bubba Kush, delivering balanced potency with smooth, full-bodied effects. This sativa-leaning hybrid builds gradually, offering an uplifting, euphoric headspace paired with steady, calming body relaxation.

Its terpene profile blends sweet creamy vanilla kush with notes of grape and bright lemon citrus. The aroma adds floral spice layered over rich, fruity depth.

Dense emerald-green buds feature deep purple leaves, orange hairs, and a thick coating of bright white trichomes.

5d8f6c97b9ab.name: PR Early Lemon Berry
5d8f6c97b9ab.description: Las Vegas Lemon Skunk x Member Berry

39b8db68a598.name: PR Poison Gushers
39b8db68a598.description:
Poison Gushers is an indica-leaning hybrid bred from F1 Durban Poison x TK41. Known for its balanced potency and terpene-rich profile, this strain delivers a smooth blend of cerebral lift and grounded body relaxation.

Dominant terpenes include caryophyllene, limonene, and myrcene, contributing to a flavor profile that blends sweet fruit with citrus brightness and subtle earthy spice. The aroma carries a bold, candy-forward character with a lightly gassy edge.

A versatile hybrid suited for consumers seeking flavor depth and balanced effects.

3c5d10cfef28.name: PR Bubblegum - Keif Coated
3c5d10cfef28.description: Indiana Bubblegum X Unkown Indica Strain

c3ac2c3375ab.name: PR Jacked up Boof - Keif Coated
c3ac2c3375ab.description:
Jacked up flowed coated in Super Boof kief.

Super Boof: Purple Panty Dropper x Blueberry.

Jacked Up: Jack Herer x Timewreck.

643a5fc06fa2.name: PR Medusa 2pk
643a5fc06fa2.description: Medusa, more commonly referred to as “The Nirvana Strain,” is a hybrid of the cult favorite Misty strain with an unknown sativa to indica ratio. However, it is thought to be evenly balanced due to its powerful combination of sativa and indica effects that complement each other perfectly.

bc4c058f8526.name: PR Fight Club
bc4c058f8526.description:
Fight Club is a balanced hybrid known for its bold character and refined terpene profile. This strain delivers an uplifting cerebral edge paired with smooth, grounded relaxation, making it versatile for both daytime and evening use.

Its aroma leads with bright citrus notes of orange and lemon, layered with subtle herbal and earthy undertones. The flavor follows with tangy grapefruit, light sweetness, and a touch of spice on the finish.

Dense forest-green buds feature purple accents, orange pistils, and a thick coating of frosty trichomes.

223a4c4c39a3.name: PR Gary Payton
223a4c4c39a3.description:
Gary Payton is a powerhouse hybrid bred from Snowman x Cherry Pie x Girl Scout Cookies. Known for its potency and balance, this strain delivers an immediate boost of clear-headed focus paired with steady, mellow body relaxation.

The flavor profile blends nutty cherry cookie sweetness with sugary diesel and subtle spice. Its aroma leans heavier on fuel-forward notes, layered with sweet cherries and berries.

Fluffy emerald-green buds feature dark undertones, fine orange hairs, and a thick coating of sparkling white trichomes.

d3006f64125c.name: Blueberry Cookies
d3006f64125c.description: Blueberry Tahoe x Girl Scout Cookies Thin Mints

72e775ab419b.name: Lemon Cherry Gelato
72e775ab419b.description: Sunset Sherbet X Girl Scout Cookies X another unknown strain

2fc15c23d6c8.name: Terp Poison
2fc15c23d6c8.description:
Terp Poison is a vibrant cross of Durban Poison x AVL, delivering bold citrus intensity with energetic, daytime-friendly effects. This sativa-leaning hybrid offers an uplifting, focused headspace that supports creativity and productivity.

Dominant terpenes, led by terpinolene, create a sharp aroma of sweet lemon, lime, and gassy fuel with a bright, herbal edge. The experience is clear, motivating, and socially engaging.

Dense sage-green buds are heavily coated in shimmering resin, highlighting its rich terpene profile and premium visual appeal.

f78909fb37f2.name: Strawberry
f78909fb37f2.description:
Classic, sweet, and easygoing. Voyageur Strawberry gummies deliver a bright, ripe strawberry flavor with just the right touch of sweetness in every bite. Each pack includes 10 precisely dosed gummies at 10mg each, offering consistent potency and a dependable experience from start to finish.


With a smooth chew and familiar fruit-forward taste, Strawberry is a go-to option for any occasion whether you're winding down for the evening or settling in for a relaxed night with friends. Simple, flavorful, and reliably dosed.

d57b1883b7b7.name: PR Cherry Purgatory - Keif Coated
d57b1883b7b7.description: Dante's Inferno (Oreoz × Devil Driver) flower infused with Cherry Nirvana terpenes, rolled in kief.

a1d94f46edc0.name: Green Apple Gummy Bar
a1d94f46edc0.description: 10 MG per serving and 100mg per bar.

487b0db2bda3.name: Cotton Candy Gummy Bar
487b0db2bda3.description: 10 MG per serving and 100mg per bar.

4df4f8a73ed8.name: PR Orion 2 pk
4df4f8a73ed8.description: Orion is known as a "drift" strain. It leads with euphoric calm, balancing sweetness and strength for a deep, unhurried high that feels expansive rather than heavy. Orion is profiled as a balanced, uniform hybrid that marries uplifting mental- clarity with subsequent body-high tranquility.

e019a1dcc69b.name: Barnyard High Test
e019a1dcc69b.description:
Barnyard High Test is a potent hybrid bred from Chem Dog Funk x Auto Varin Lime Sour. True to its name, this strain delivers a bold, musky aroma layered with fuel-forward notes, burned rubber, and subtle sour citrus undertones.

Known for its high total cannabinoid content, Barnyard High Test offers a strong, full-spectrum experience suited for seasoned consumers. The profile leans gassy and earthy, making it a standout for those who appreciate classic funk-driven strains with intensity and depth.

A powerful option for customers seeking robust flavor and elevated potency.

544546f4af9b.name: Tropicana Cherry
544546f4af9b.description:
Tropicana Cherry is a vibrant cross of Tropicana Cookies x Cherry Cookies, delivering bold fruit-forward flavor with energetic effects. This sativa-leaning hybrid offers an uplifting cerebral boost paired with smooth, balanced body ease.

Its terpene profile blends sweet and sour citrus with ripe cherry and subtle earthy nuttiness. The aroma leans sharp and citrus-forward with a bright, tangy finish.

Oversized forest-green buds showcase purple undertones, amber hairs, and a frosty coating of white trichomes.

bcda70086ab4.name: PR Grape Cream Cake
bcda70086ab4.description:
Grape Cream Cake is a cross of Grape Pie x Wedding Crasher, delivering rich flavor and soothing indica-leaning effects. This strain settles in shortly after exhale, offering a warm, uplifting headspace that gradually transitions into deep physical relaxation.

Its terpene profile features sweet cherry and berry notes layered with creamy vanilla, sugary nuttiness, and subtle grape spice. As the experience deepens, it leans calming and sleepy, making it well-suited for evening use.

Bright neon-green buds display orange hairs and a frosty layer of purple-tinted trichomes.

299f063bcfee.name: Amnesia
299f063bcfee.description:
Cinderella 99, x Jack Herer x Skunk. 

Amnesia won the first place in the Cannabis Cup 2014 and the Sativa Cup 2012. Since then, it has been commonly available in coffee shops in Amsterdam.

ef28e34f66ec.name: Zesty Parm 7g - Indica
ef28e34f66ec.description:
Cherry Kush X (Lemon Tree Papaya X GMO) X FroDo strains

This particular batch is Sativa-leaning. Zesty Parm is a hybrid strain, typically categorized as a slightly indica-dominant blend (usually around 60% indica and 40% sativa). However, depending on the specific cultivator and grow batch, it can lean heavily into sativa effects or present as a balanced hybrid.

05f86efba14c.name: PR Bumper OG  3pk
05f86efba14c.description: (Amnesia S1 x Black Lime GMO) blended with a (Cherry Kush x [Lemon Tree/Papaya x GMO])

66477ce1c142.name: Pink Lemonade
66477ce1c142.description:
Pink Lemonade is a flavorful cross of Purple Kush x Lemon Skunk, offering sweet citrus character with smooth, indica-leaning effects. This strain opens with a gentle cerebral uplift before easing into a relaxed, dreamy state that feels creative and introspective.

Its terpene profile blends sugary fruit and lemon candy with subtle earthy and berry undertones. The aroma carries bright citrus layered over soft earthiness.

Minty-green spade-shaped buds feature light orange hairs and a thick coating of frosty golden trichomes.

4ae59f844af9.name: PR Lit OG
4ae59f844af9.description:
Lit OG is a potent cross of Tahoe OG x Runtz, delivering immediate uplift with smooth indica-backed relaxation. This strain opens with a wave of clear-headed euphoria before settling into a calm, body-soothing finish that keeps you comfortably grounded.

Its terpene profile blends sweet, creamy citrus with classic kush, woody pine, and subtle spice. The aroma leans rich and earthy with bright fruit undertones.

Oversized olive-green buds feature purple accents, thick orange hairs, and a frosty coating of crystal trichomes.

c609701a342f.description: 10mg THC per Gummy - 10 Gummies per pack. 100mg total.

Its terpene profile blends sugary fruit and lemon candy with subtle earthy and berry undertones. The aroma carries bright citrus layered over soft earthiness.

Minty-green spade-shaped buds feature light orange hairs and a thick coating of frosty golden trichomes.
